message:
test: enhance runtime and scheduler test coverage

Expand test coverage for runtime and scheduler functionality:

builder_verification.rs:
- Add tests for root_region_limits configuration
- Test try_spawn error handling
- Verify admission control behavior

scheduler_lane_fairness.rs:
- Add comprehensive fairness tests for three-lane scheduler
- Test priority lane behavior under load
- Verify work-stealing fairness

repro_leak_check_commutativity.rs:
- Additional edge case coverage for VarState::join()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
